title: 9 herbal teas for runners with knee swelling
description: Hamamelis virginiana essential oils, also known as witch hazel, contain properties and constituents that make it effective in reducing knee swelling. It has anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and analgesic properties due to the presence of compounds like salicylic acid, gallic acid, and tannins. These properties help reduce inflammation and pain, making it easier to manage knee swelling.
